programme.title: Pink Floyd: The Endless River
programme.desc: Enigmatic interpretation of Pink Floyds music, with secrets, enigmas and metaphors. Two tribes struggle to survive on a dying planet, while attempting to communicate with the life force of earth itself.

programme.title: Songbook
programme.desc: The line-up changed, the style evolved, but the hits kept coming. From Peter Gabriel to Phil Collins, `Invisible Touch to `I Cant Dance, a documentary that charts the inspiration of Genesis.

programme.title: Classic Albums
programme.desc: An insight into the making of U2s 1987 studio album `The Joshua Tree, which is featured as a favourite in many Top 100 polls. Bono, The Edge, Adam Clayton, Larry Mullen, and producers Brian Eno and Daniel Lanois provide intimate contributions.

programme.title: Opera Norths Resonance
programme.desc: Created by NikNak, Randy Duburke and Peta-Gaye Brown, follow a character stuck in a hectic city without peace - until their ancestors help them discover their power.

programme.title: Andre Rieu at Schonbrunn, Vienna
programme.desc: Accompanied by the Johann Strauss Orchestra, world renowned violinist Andre Rieu performs numbers including Roses from the South, and Emperors Waltz at Schonbrunn in Vienna.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A neurotic woman with a fear of not being punctual is tormented by her husband on a troubled trip to America.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A story of greed and deceit in which an art collector is drawn into a battle with two glamorous women.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A tough lady gets her comeuppance when she plans an evil joke at the expense of a nice young couple.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: Mike will bet on anything - even his daughters hand in marriage - that no-one can name the rare wine he has found. He cannot lose, can he?

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: A young couple (James MacArthur, Lynn Loring) tries to convince the brides mother (Gloria Swanson) that their love is sincere.

programme.title: Landscape Artist of the Year
programme.desc: Pitching easels and priming canvases to find out who is the Landscape Artist of the Year. Hopeful contestants try to paint their way to a life-changing cash prize in various locations across the country.

programme.title: Michelangelo: Saint Or Sinner?
programme.desc: Follow the creative spark that was ignited by Michelangelos most controversial commission, the Mausoleum of Pope Julius II. A work that took 40 years to complete and ran into a series of changes and political upheavals within the Vatican.

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: A look at the life and career of two-time Academy Award-winning British film icon Sir Michael Caine.

programme.title: The Carpenters: Close to You
programme.desc: A retrospective look at the career of the Carpenters.

programme.title: Luther Vandross: Live at Royal Albert Hall
programme.desc: Enjoy this glitzy, upbeat celebration of the greatest music from Luther Vandross, featuring a full gospel choir.

programme.title: Rod Stewart: It Had to Be You
Exodus
programme.desc: A chronicle of Palestines fight for independence in 1947 and beyond. The story focuses on a moderate Israeli resistance leader and embraces his love for a non-Jewish army nurse, his differences with the extremist Irgun factions and his struggle to emancipate hundreds of survivors of Nazi concentration camps trapped on the Exodus, a vessel blockaded in a Cypriot harbour by British warships.

programme.title: Opry Live
programme.sub-title: Jon Pardi, Zach Top, Ashley McBryde
programme.desc: Celebrate Opry 100 with superstars, newcomers and legends - its never the same show twice! Jon Pardi, Zach Top and Ashley McBryde.

programme.title: Isle Of Wight Festival 2025
programme.sub-title: Texas At Isle Of Wight Festival
programme.desc: Musicians perform at the Isle Of Wight Festival, one of the UKs oldest music festivals. The event is hosted at Seaclose Park, Newport, in June 2025 and headlined by Sting, Justin Timberlake, and Stereophonics.

programme.title: Isle Of Wight Festival 2025
programme.sub-title: Texas At Isle Of Wight Festival
programme.desc: Musicians perform at the Isle Of Wight Festival, one of the UKs oldest music festivals. The event is hosted at Seaclose Park, Newport, in June 2025 and headlined by Sting, Justin Timberlake, and Stereophonics.

programme.title: Shooter
programme.desc: Following the death of his friend, Bobby decides to leave the army but he is soon asked to come back into action in order to help prevent the assassination of the President.

programme.title: Rampage
programme.desc: Primatologist Davis Okoye shares an unshakable bond with George, an extraordinarily intelligent silverback gorilla thats been in his care since birth. When a genetic experiment goes wrong, it causes George, a wolf and a reptile to grow to a monstrous size. As the mutated beasts embark on a path of destruction, Okoye teams up with a discredited genetic engineer and the military to secure an antidote and prevent a global catastrophe.

programme.title: 2 Fast 2 Furious
programme.desc: To clear his criminal record a former LA cop must infiltrate the Miami street-racing scene to set up a drug baron. Burning rubber all over the city with his ex-con friend, he attempts to deliver the crook to the FBI without crashing and being blown to pieces in one of the many explosions.

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift
programme.desc: Street-racing sequel following an adrenaline-junkie automobile addict who narrowly avoids jail by agreeing to move in with his father in Tokyo. However, he soon discovers the thrill of the local underground drift racing scene and unwittingly becomes involved with the Yakuza.

programme.title: Uncharted
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Victor Sullivan recruits Nathan Drake to help him recover a 500-year-old fortune. What starts out as a heist becomes a globe-trotting, white-knuckle race to reach the prize before the ruthless Santiago Moncada can get his hands on it.

programme.title: Morbius
programme.desc: Biochemist Michael Morbius tries to cure himself of a rare blood disease, but when his experiment goes wrong, he inadvertently infects himself with a form of vampirism instead.

programme.title: Venom
programme.desc: Journalist Eddie Brock is trying to take down Carlton Drake, the notorious and brilliant founder of the Life Foundation. While investigating one of Drakes experiments, Eddies body merges with the alien Venom -- leaving him with superhuman strength and power. Twisted, dark and fueled by rage, Venom tries to control the new and dangerous abilities that Eddie finds so intoxicating.

programme.title: Venom: Let There Be Carnage
programme.desc: Eddie Brock is still struggling to coexist with the shape-shifting extraterrestrial Venom. When deranged serial killer Cletus Kasady also becomes host to an alien symbiote, Brock and Venom must put aside their differences to stop his reign of terror.

programme.title: Batman
programme.desc: In an attempt to avenge the violent death of his parents, Bruce Wayne fights to rid the city of crime and in particular, his nemesis the Joker. However, his defences come down when an attractive journalist tries to track down the truth behind sightings of a huge bat-like figure in the sky.

programme.title: Jurassic World
programme.desc: Jurassic Park is now called Jurassic World, a fully functional dinosaur park that sees 20,000 visitors a year, the realisation of owner John Hammonds dreams. The scientists may have gone too far in creating some sort of hybrid dinosaur, which escapes and terrorises the park.

programme.title: The Meg
programme.desc: A massive creature attacks a deep-sea submersible, leaving it disabled and trapping the crew at the bottom of the Pacific Ocean. With time running out, rescue diver Jonas Taylor must save the crew and the ocean itself from an unimaginable threat: a 75-foot-long prehistoric shark known as the megalodon.

programme.title: Morbius
programme.desc: Biochemist Michael Morbius tries to cure himself of a rare blood disease, but when his experiment goes wrong, he inadvertently infects himself with a form of vampirism instead.

programme.title: The Dark Tower
programme.desc: Roland Deschain, the last Gunslinger, must prevent the Man in Black from toppling the Dark Tower, the key that holds the universe together.

programme.title: The Dark Tower
programme.desc: Roland Deschain, the last Gunslinger, must prevent the Man in Black from toppling the Dark Tower, the key that holds the universe together.

programme.title: Scary Girl
programme.desc: To save her father from a dangerous scientist in a world shrouded in darkness, and prevent her planets destruction, a young girl overcomes her fears to travel to a mysterious city of light.

programme.title: Buffalo Kids
programme.desc: Arriving in New York City in 1886, two orphaned Irish siblings embark on a wild cross-country journey aboard a transcontinental train. They make a new friend and encounter heroes and villains in their quest to find a new home.

programme.title: Bee Movie
programme.desc: Barry B Benson is an everybee with a dream. He escapes the hive and makes contact with a human, the florist Vanessa Bloome. Enraged to discover that humans have been stealing their honey goodness, Barry sets out on a crusade that will change the ecosystem forever. Will it be for the better? A DreamWorks animation.

programme.title: Fireheart
programme.desc: In New York City in 1932, women are not allowed to be firefighters. When the citys firemen disappear in mysterious fires, Georgia Nolan sees a golden opportunity. She disguises herself as Joe and joins a team of improvised firemen.

programme.title: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa
programme.desc: The sequel to `Madagascar, in which New York Zoo animals, Alex the Lion, Marty the Zebra, Melman the Giraffe and Gloria the Hippo, still stranded on Madagascar, start to leave the island. All of a sudden, they land in the wilderness of Africa, where Alex meets the rest of his family, but has trouble communicating with them after spending so much time at the Central Park Zoo.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: Shipwrecked on a deserted island, a robot named Roz must learn to adapt to its new surroundings. Building relationships with the native animals, Roz soon develops a parental bond with an orphaned gosling.

programme.title: Transformers One
programme.desc: Brothers-in-arms Orion Pax and D-16 become sworn enemies Optimus Prime and Megatron.

programme.title: Despicable Me 4
programme.desc: Gru welcomes a new member to the family, Gru Jr., whos intent on tormenting his dad. However, their peaceful existence soon comes crashing down when criminal mastermind Maxime Le Mal escapes from prison and vows revenge against Gru.

programme.title: Monster Family
programme.desc: Draculas spell turns a woman and her loved ones into a vampire, a mummy, a werewolf and Frankensteins monster.

programme.title: Monster Family 2
programme.desc: Baba Yaga and Renfield are captured by a monster hunter so the Wishbone family once again transform into a vampire Frankensteins monster a mummy and a werewolf in a bid to free them.

programme.title: Turbo
programme.desc: A snail gets the chance to escape his slow-paced life and race in the Indianapolis 500 when a freak accident gives him the power of superspeed.

programme.title: Rango
programme.desc: An ordinary chameleon, Rango, winds up in the town of Dirt, a lawless outpost in the Wild West in need of a new sheriff.

programme.title: Scary Girl
programme.desc: To save her father from a dangerous scientist in a world shrouded in darkness, and prevent her planets destruction, a young girl overcomes her fears to travel to a mysterious city of light.

programme.title: Buffalo Kids
programme.desc: Arriving in New York City in 1886, two orphaned Irish siblings embark on a wild cross-country journey aboard a transcontinental train. They make a new friend and encounter heroes and villains in their quest to find a new home.

programme.title: Batman Unlimited: Monster Mayhem
programme.desc: The Dark Knight assembles his heroic friends like Green Arrow and Nightwing to stop the Joker and his cronies from unleashing a diabolical computer virus.

programme.title: Batman Unlimited: Monster Mayhem
programme.desc: The Dark Knight assembles his heroic friends like Green Arrow and Nightwing to stop the Joker and his cronies from unleashing a diabolical computer virus.

programme.title: Jackass 3
programme.desc: Johnny Knoxville and the gang unleash their most insane stunts yet, from roller-skating with a buffalo herd, to playing tennis with a beehive.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Bingeable
programme.desc: On the Cinema List, join us as we explore our favourite franchises to get cosy with, from Transformers to Bad Boys 2. Snuggle down on the sofa and take your pick.

programme.title: Jackass Presents: Bad Grandpa
programme.desc: Irving Zisman takes his young and impressionable grandson on a cross-country trip in which they encounter male strippers, biker-bar patrons and other unsuspecting citizens.

programme.title: Jackass Presents: Bad Grandpa .5
programme.desc: Irving Zisman takes his young and impressionable grandson on a cross-country trip in which they encounter male strippers, biker-bar patrons and other unsuspecting citizens.

programme.title: Team America: World Police
programme.desc: A gung-ho, `Thunderbirds-style squad of puppets lead Americas war on terrorism. The creators of `South Park go on the offensive with an outrageous animated satire that makes a target of everyone from politicians to Hollywood liberals.

programme.title: So I Married an Axe Murderer
programme.desc: A lonely poet whos unlucky in love believes hes struck gold when he meets Harriet, an attractive, witty woman who owns a butchers shop. They fall in love and marry, but a series of strange occurrences lead him to suspect that his new wife may be harbouring a dark and deadly secret.

programme.title: American Pie
programme.desc: Believing it essential before they go to college, four teenage boys vow to lose their virginity and enter into a pact, each attempting to be the first to do the deed as their efforts are met with varying levels of success and failure.

programme.title: In and Out
programme.desc: The entire town is watching with bated breath as one of their own is up for an Oscar. They get more than they bargain for when he outs his high-school English teacher, who then has to prove to everyone, especially his fiancee, that hes straight. The press turn up and one reporter in particular is making life very difficult.

programme.title: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: When Brenda Cushman, Elise Elliot and Annie Paradis are reunited at the funeral of a college friend, they discover they have another thing in common: theyve all been dumped by their husbands, Morty, Bill and Aaron, for a younger model. Vowing revenge, they decide to hit them where it hurts most: the pocket. Using help and their various skills, they begin to pick them off one by on.

programme.title: Sex Tape
programme.desc: When Annie and Jay first met, they had an instant and intense romantic connection. However, 10 years and two children later, the flames of passion have dimmed to dull embers. To bring the spark back to their relationship, Annie and Jay decide to record themselves trying out every position in "The Joy of Sex." It seems like a great idea -- until they discover that their private recording has gone public via the Internet.

programme.title: The Wedding Singer
programme.desc: When one-time rock hopeful Robbie is jilted at the altar, he vents his bitterness in song, even when singing at other peoples weddings. Only true love can redeem the broken hearted songster but fortunately, hes about to meet a woman who will spin him right round (like a record).

programme.title: American Pie 2
programme.desc: Action-packed sequel in which a group of friends are reunited after their freshman year of college and embark upon a series of comical adventures when they rent a summer house on Lake Michigan.

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: A crazy Las Vegas bachelor party turns into a race against time when three hung-over groomsmen awaken after a night of drunken debauchery to find that the groom has gone missing, and attempt to get him to the alter in time for his wedding.

programme.title: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: A group of friends go to Thailand for a quiet and restrained stag party, but are dismayed to wake up in a mysterious hotel room, with a man missing and no memory of the night before. Of course, Alan manages to get himself in with the crowd.

programme.title: The Hangover Part III
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Doug take Alan on a road trip to help him through a personal crisis.

programme.title: The Hangover Part III
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Doug take Alan on a road trip to help him through a personal crisis.

programme.title: Mollys Game
programme.desc: Molly Bloom runs the worlds most exclusive high-stakes poker game for a decade before being arrested by the FBI. Her only ally is defence lawyer Charlie Jaffey, who learns that there is much more to Molly than the tabloids lead people to believe.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Risky Romance
programme.desc: From killers and zombies to forbidden love and dangerous desires, `The Cinema List explores romances where passion courts danger and love is always worth the risk.

programme.title: Peggy Sue Got Married
programme.desc: A bittersweet story about a 43-year-old woman on the verge of divorce who magically travels back in time to her senior high-school years. She is able to act with the benefit of hindsight, but despite her efforts, she falls for the same boy all over again.

programme.title: Nuremberg
programme.desc: As the Nuremberg trials are set to begin, a U.S. Army psychiatrist gets locked in a dramatic psychological showdown with accused Nazi war criminal Hermann Goring.

programme.title: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: A sports agent who makes the mistake of saying what he believes, finds himself sacked and abandoned by all his clients apart from small time footballer Rod Tidwell. Maguires personal life starts to fall apart as hes torn between love and money in Cameron Crowes metaphor on Americans need for success and money.

programme.title: Do the Right Thing
programme.desc: Its the hottest day of the year and when Italian-American Sal refuses to make changes to his pizza parlour in the predominantly black community, tension and tempers mount.

programme.title: Peggy Sue Got Married
programme.desc: A bittersweet story about a 43-year-old woman on the verge of divorce who magically travels back in time to her senior high-school years. She is able to act with the benefit of hindsight, but despite her efforts, she falls for the same boy all over again.

programme.title: About a Boy
programme.desc: Parallel coming-of-age stories of a layabout `serial nice guy living a posh, carefree lifestyle off his deceased fathers fortune, and a bright but awkward youth whos tired of his mothers depressed, boyfriend-less state. Their paths collide when the boy fabricates a two-year-old son and joins a group called S.P.A.T. (Single Parents Alone Together).

programme.title: It Ends With Us
programme.desc: Lily Bloom falls for a charming neurosurgeon after she moves to Boston to chase her dream of opening her own business. However, when her first love suddenly reenters her life, her relationship gets upended, leaving her with an impossible choice.

programme.title: Lost in Translation
programme.desc: In Tokyo shooting a whisky commercial, middle-aged actor Bob Harris becomes attracted to Charlotte, the young wife of a celebrity photographer. Together they ride out their boredom of hotel life and their bewilderment of the city.

programme.title: Mollys Game
programme.desc: Molly Bloom runs the worlds most exclusive high-stakes poker game for a decade before being arrested by the FBI. Her only ally is defence lawyer Charlie Jaffey, who learns that there is much more to Molly than the tabloids lead people to believe.

programme.title: Valentines Day
programme.desc: Following a group of Los Angeles residents who try to find their way through the highs and lows of love during a single day.

programme.title: Valentines Day
programme.desc: Following a group of Los Angeles residents who try to find their way through the highs and lows of love during a single day.

programme.title: Friend or Foe
programme.desc: WWII evacuee David hates the Germans, but now his life has been saved by one. What is the right thing to do, tell the Army or offer his help?

programme.title: Blueback
programme.desc: After Dora suffers a stroke, her adult daughter, Abby returns to her coastal Australian hometown to help with her recovery. To try to coax Dora out of her nonverbal state, Abby tells her stories from her childhood, recalling Doras activism.

programme.title: Spy Kids 3: Game Over
programme.desc: The Spy Kids set off on their third adventure. Secret Agent Carmen finds herself trapped in a 3-D virtual reality video game designed by their new arch nemesis, the Toymaker. Juni must save his sister, as they battle it out against lifelike 3-D monsters, completing each progressively harder level and ultimately trying to save the youth of the world.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop
programme.desc: Paul Blart desperately wants to become a cop, but he is too fat to pass the physical exam. He instead works as a security guard in a shopping mall. One day criminals put the mall under siege, and Blart takes it upon himself to save the day.

programme.title: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Following the adventures of Yang who is a successor in to a long line of Avatars. He has to put aside his childhood in order to stop he Fire Nation from enslaving the Water, Earth and Air nations.

programme.title: Shrek
programme.desc: The story of a reclusive green ogre called Shrek whose life of solitude is disrupted by a horde of refugees who have been banished by the evil Lord Farquaad. Determined to save his home, Shrek cuts a deal with the tyrant, who sets him a daunting task - if Shrek is ever to enjoy peace and quiet again, he must rescue Farquaads bride-to-be from a dangerous castle.

programme.title: Shrek 2
programme.desc: Ogre Shrek and his new wife Fiona are surprised to discover a letter from her parents, inviting them over for dinner. Fiona is eager to show off her new husband, but her parents dont yet know shes an ogre. Taking Donkey along, they set off for Far Far Away to visit them, but the trip is hampered by the jealousy of a wicked fairy godmother and her hired assassin, Puss in Boots.

programme.title: Shrek the Third
programme.desc: Shrek is just starting to settle down in his beloved swamp with his wife Fiona, but their mucky bliss doesnt last for long as word arrives that the ogres froggy father-in-law is about to croak. The very last thing Shrek wants is to become King, but with no other heir in sight, it looks like the grumpy green one is destined never to live quietly in the swamp again. A glimmer of hope appears in the form of heir Artie.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: Peter Rabbit and his three sisters -- Flopsy, Mopsy and Cotton-Tail -- enjoy spending their days in Mr. McGregors vegetable garden. When one of McGregors relatives suddenly moves in, hes less than thrilled to discover a family of rabbits in his new home. A battle of wills soon breaks out as the new owner hatches scheme after scheme to get rid of Peter -- a resourceful rabbit who proves to be a worthy and wily opponent.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: A magic portal transports the little blue people to Manhattan, where they must find a way back to their village before evil wizard Gargamel can find them.

programme.title: The Smurfs 2
programme.desc: Papa and the rest of the Smurfs reunite with their human friends to rescue Smurfette from the clutches of evil wizard Gargamel.

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug
Spy Kids
programme.desc: Two siblings set out on a mission to rescue their ex-spy parents. Summoned back to work from their uneventful lives, the adults run into trouble while on duty. When the children are called upon to help them, they find out about their parents former identities while at the same time developing a greater appreciation for each other.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop 2
programme.desc: Paul Blart takes his teenage daughter with him to Las Vegas for a security-guard expo. While there, he stumbles upon a heist and must single-handedly apprehend the crooks.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop 2
programme.desc: Paul Blart takes his teenage daughter with him to Las Vegas for a security-guard expo. While there, he stumbles upon a heist and must single-handedly apprehend the crooks.

programme.title: Interview With the Vampire
programme.desc: When reporter Daniel Malloys curiosity leads him to interview the mysterious Louis De Pointe Du Lac, the last thing he expects is to find himself talking to a vampire. Louis tells him his life story, about how he was turned, and the vampire Lestat who made him what he is.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: Mars Attacks!
programme.desc: Bug-eyed martians in flying saucers descend on unsuspecting Planet Earth to wreak untold havoc, as they kidnap a chat-show host and a scientist for evil experiments and blow up famous monuments around the world. Who can protect our defenceless world from raygun-toting aliens?

programme.title: The Bridges at Toko-Ri
programme.desc: A conflicted Navy pilot and veteran of the Second World War questions the role he is forced to play when he is called back into service for the Korean War.

programme.title: Shenandoah
programme.desc: A mans neutrality during the American Civil War is tested by his daughters marriage and his sons capture by Union forces.

programme.title: Demolition Man
programme.desc: Violence has been outlawed in the politically correct regime of 2032, and the only weapons in existence are consigned to a museum, but when an escaped psychopath heads straight for the museum, the authorities decide the only effective recourse they have is to thaw out a violent, cryogenically frozen cop.

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: Epic tale in which an intrepid archaeologist tries to beat a band of Nazis to a unique religious relic which is central to their plans for world domination. Battling against a snake phobia and a vengeful ex-girlfriend, Indiana Jones is in constant peril, making hairs-breadth escapes at every turn in this celebration of the innocent adventure movies of an earlier era.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
programme.desc: Adventure sequel. Intrepid archaeologist Indiana Jones, on the trail of fortune and glory in Old Shanghai, is ricocheted into a dangerous adventure in India. With his faithful companion Short Round and nightclub singer Willie Scott, Indie goes in search of the magical Sankara stone, and uncovers an ancient evil which threatens all who come into contact with it.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
programme.desc: The intrepid explorer Indiana Jones sets out to rescue his father, a medievalist who has vanished while searching for the Holy Grail. Following clues in the old mans notebook, Indy arrives in Venice, where he enlists the help of a beautiful academic, but they are not the only ones who are on the trail, and some sinister old enemies soon come out of the woodwork.

programme.title: The Naked Gun: From the Files of Police Squad!
programme.desc: Hard-boiled incompetent cop Frank Drebin must stop the evil Vincent Ludwig from completing his diabolical plan of killing Elizabeth II.

programme.title: The Naked Gun 2 1/2: The Smell of Fear
programme.desc: Lt Frank Debrin uncovers a plot by the polluting energy giants to de-rail ecological plans that could render their products redundant. Theyre led by the evil Quentin Hapsburg who, to make matters worse, is romancing Franks ex, Jane Spencer.

programme.title: The Naked Gun 33 1/3: The Final Insult
programme.desc: Clueless cop Frank Drebin is hauled out of retirement to save the Oscars ceremony from mad bombers. Anna Nicole Smith provides support in this comic sequel.

programme.title: The Long Kiss Goodnight
programme.desc: An amnesiac schoolteacher discovers she was formerly a government assassin when she hires a low-rent private eye to help fill the gaps in her memory. Together, they go on the run in a race against the clock to stop her former taskmasters from putting a heinous plan into action, before they can silence her for good.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: A glamorous career woman loses control when her married lover, a Manhattan attorney, ends their brief affair. Unable to accept his rejection, she pursues him at the office, and then at his home, eventually drawing his wife and daughter into the confrontation.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: A glamorous career woman loses control when her married lover, a Manhattan attorney, ends their brief affair. Unable to accept his rejection, she pursues him at the office, and then at his home, eventually drawing his wife and daughter into the confrontation.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II
programme.desc: The hard-nosed Detroit cop from the original film returns to Los Angeles to help solve another case. This time he must direct his efforts towards unraveling the Alphabet Crimes, a series of robberies committed by leather-jacketed punks. The investigation puts him on the trail of an illegal arms dealer and his hit lady.

programme.desc: When a crew of animal bandits embark on a routine swindle, they find themselves caught up in a train heist. Its up to Falcon, a petty thief raccoon, and Rex, a righteous police-dog, to save the animals on this high-speed runway train.

programme.desc: Members of a family find themselves in a desperate fight for survival when a pack of coyotes swarms their Hollywood Hills home.

programme.desc: Fantastical creatures come to life when a girls sketchbook falls into a strange pond. As the town starts to unravel, she and her brother must track down the unpredictable, chaotic and dangerously real monsters before they cause permanent damage.

programme.desc: Skilled operatives travel to an island research facility to secure life-saving DNA from dinosaurs. As the top-secret mission becomes more and more dangerous, they soon make a sinister, shocking discovery thats been hidden from the world for decades.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi and Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Ready Player One
programme.desc: In 2045 the planet is on the brink of chaos and collapse, but people find salvation in the OASIS: an expansive virtual reality universe created by eccentric James Halliday. When Halliday dies, he promises his immense fortune to the first person to discover a digital Easter egg thats hidden somewhere in the OASIS. When young Wade Watts joins the contest, he finds himself becoming an unlikely hero in a reality-bending treasure hunt through a fantastical world of mystery, discovery and danger.

The duo join forces with Wichita and Little Rock who have a style and tact of their own when it comes to dealing with the flesh-eating chaos.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi and Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Sinners
programme.desc: Trying to leave their troubled lives behind, twin brothers return to their Mississippi hometown to start again, only to discover that an even greater evil is waiting to welcome them back.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi and Horror HD.uk
programme.title: I Am Legend
programme.desc: In the year 2012, scientists engineer a cure for cancer. Three years later, every human in New York is dead or mutated into a light-sensitive zombie by the virus that was supposed to heal. Only one man survives, virologist Robert Neville. He has two aims: find a cure for the virus and make contact with other survivors.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi and Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Annabelle
programme.desc: A possessed doll that was purchased for their new born child creates havoc, and destroys a young couples lives.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi and Horror HD.uk

programme.desc: Years after the tragic death of their daughter, a former toy maker and his wife welcome a nun and six orphaned girls into their farmhouse. Terror soon strikes when one child finds a seemingly innocent doll that appears to have a life of its own.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi and Horror HD.uk

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King
programme.desc: The final part of the fantasy trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens epic tale. Despite Gollum, hobbits Frodo and Sam reach Mordor in their quest to destroy the `one ring, while Aragorn leads the forces of good against Saurons evil army at the stone city of Minas Tirith. Then, to buy Frodo and Sam time, they must march to the very gates of Mordor to distract Saurons gaze from the Ring bearer.

programme.title: Darkest Hour
programme.desc: With the German Army now just across the Channel, newly-appointed Prime Minister Winston Churchill must decide between negotiating a peace treaty with Hitler or standing firm. With the King, the public and his own political party all questioning his wisdom, the hard-drinking Churchill has to survive his own darkest hour and rally the country behind him.

programme.title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: Heartwarming tale in which a ten-year-old boy befriends and shelters a gentle alien creature who has been stranded on Earth. When the authorities are alerted to this unusual house guest, the boy tries to help the creature return home before menacing government agents close in. The film won three Academy Awards for music, sound and special effects.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon
programme.desc: On the isle of Berk, a Viking boy named Hiccup defies tradition by befriending a dragon named Toothless. However, when an ancient threat emerges that endangers both species, Hiccups friendship with Toothless becomes the key to forging a new future.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: On a remote island, a wealthy entrepreneur creates a theme park featuring living dinosaurs drawn from prehistoric DNA. Before opening the attraction to the public, he invites a top palaeontologist, palaeobotanist, mathematician/theorist, and his two eager grandchildren to experience the park. Their park visit is anything but tranquil as the parks security system breaks down, and the prehistoric creatures break out.

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring
programme.desc: Frodo is a hobbit who elects to become the bearer of the Ring of Power, which, if reclaimed by its maker and master Lord Sauron, will see him gain full and terrible power over all of Middle Earth. Frodo sets out with The Fellowship of the Ring, led by Gandalf and Aragorn, and six other companions to Saurons stronghold, Mordor, the only place where the ring can be destroyed.

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers
programme.desc: Hobbits Frodo and Sam discover they are being followed by the mysterious Gollum. A mercurial creature who has been warped by the Ring, Gollum promises to guide the Hobbits to the Black Gates of Mordor if they will release him. Middle-earth Aragorn, the Elf archer Legolas and Gimli the Dwarf encounter the besieged Rohan kingdom, whose once great King Theoden has fallen under Sarumans deadly spell.

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King
programme.desc: The final part of the fantasy trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens epic tale. Despite Gollum, hobbits Frodo and Sam reach Mordor in their quest to destroy the `one ring, while Aragorn leads the forces of good against Saurons evil army at the stone city of Minas Tirith. Then, to buy Frodo and Sam time, they must march to the very gates of Mordor to distract Saurons gaze from the Ring bearer.

programme.title: The Kings Speech
programme.desc: Afflicted with a stammer, Prince Albert, the Duke of York, dreads the speaking engagements that come with being the son of King George V.

programme.title: Anora
programme.desc: Anora, a sex worker from Brooklyn, gets her chance at a Cinderella story when she meets and marries the son of an oligarch. Once the news reaches Russia, her fairytale is threatened as the parents set out for New York to get the marriage annulled.

programme.title: GoodFellas
programme.desc: Henry Hill knows only too well that he must put the Mobs interests before everything, even his family, but when the good times turn sour, his loyalties dissolve in the face of greater rewards. Faced with a terrible retribution, Hill can see only one way to get out alive.

programme.title: GoodFellas
programme.desc: Henry Hill knows only too well that he must put the Mobs interests before everything, even his family, but when the good times turn sour, his loyalties dissolve in the face of greater rewards. Faced with a terrible retribution, Hill can see only one way to get out alive.

programme.title: Sleepers
programme.desc: Eleven years after their horrific experiences at reform school, Tommy Marcano and John Reilly have become two-bit American gangsters, Lorenzo Carcaterra is a reporter and Michael Sullivan an assistant DA. The four are reunited when they chance across one of the abusive guards and take the chance for revenge.

programme.title: The Last Stop in Yuma County
programme.desc: Stranded at an Arizona rest stop, a travelling knife salesman gets thrust into a high-stakes hostage situation by the arrival of two bank robbers who will stop at nothing to protect their ill-begotten fortune.

programme.title: The Dry
programme.desc: Aaron Falk goes back home to his drought-stricken town to attend a tragic funeral. However, his return reopens the door to the unsolved death of a teenage girl.

programme.title: Collateral
programme.desc: After a long day, LA taxi driver Max is about to knock off when sharp-suited Vincent offers him $600 to make five stops. Sounds good until Vincent turns out to be a merciless hitman and each one of those stops involves a hit. As the night goes on, Max starts to wonder if hell live to see the sunrise, as the pair are hunted by the police and the FBI.

programme.title: Safe House
programme.desc: Six government agents become trapped inside a high-security safe house after a terrorist attack in downtown Los Angeles. They soon realise they must survive not just the enemy outside, but the potential traitor among them.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 4
programme.desc: Detective Riggs and Murtaugh are called into action to foil a Chinese crime lord who is selling immigrants into slavery on American soil. The pair arent as young as they used to be, and ending up on a Triad hit list doesnt make things easy for them either.

programme.title: Captain Phillips
programme.desc: In 2009, Somali pirates storm a U.S. containership and hold Capt. Richard Phillips and his crew captive.

programme.title: Murder by Numbers
programme.desc: A troubled female cop must unravel the perfect murder as she matches wits with two homicidal schoolboys, who believe they cant be caught after committing a motiveless crime. As she gets ever closer to the truth she at once alienates her new partner and puts her own life in peril.

programme.title: Nightcrawler
programme.desc: A driven young man named Lou stumbles upon the underground world of Los Angeles freelance crime journalism.

programme.title: Oldboy
programme.desc: Dae-Su is an obnoxious drunk bailed from the police station yet again by a friend. However, hes abducted from the street and wakes up in a cell, where he remains for the next 15 years, drugged unconscious when human contact is unavoidable, otherwise with only the television as company. And then, suddenly released, he is invited to track down his jailor with a denouement that is simply stunning.

The is the intimate story of Petit and his group of friends as they followed their dream.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: When Hopparoo bursts all their bubbles with his sharp ears, the twins use McCoggins extra-strong bubble mixture instead and blow a bubble so huge that it engulfs Battersby, Madame Au Lait, McCoggins, Lopsiloo, Chikidee and finally Tommy and Tallulah themselves! Where is Hopparoo? Only his sharp ears can free them for Chime Time.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Tommy and Tallulah love dressing up and surprising each other with their crazy costumes, but when they decide to surprise everybody else in town too Hopparoo is not impressed. In their efforts to surprise the bunny, they give the Spring Chicks such a fright that they barricade themselves in front of the clockhouse, blocking the way to Chime Time.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Madame Au Lait is teaching the twins pottery, and to inspire them she shows them a magnificent cow pot that she made on her wheel, but when she leaves them to their enthusiastic pot-making, they accidentally smash it and when they try to repair it, they only make things worse. Trying to re-create the pot is even more of a disaster. Huge quantities of clay fly from their wheel into the town, blocking Puffertys tracks.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Hopparoo is disappointed when everyone gathers for Measuring Time. He was sure hed grown more than that! Tommy and Tallulah have some crazy ideas about how to add inches, but a super-tall rabbit rampaging through town on stilts can only cause chaos.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Tommy and Tallulah are playing pirates. They are hunting for Madame Au Laits treasure, but rival pirate Hopparoo keeps trying to commandeer their cardboard boat by telling them that its Chime Time, causing them twice to abandon ship and run! So they dont believe him when Chime Time really comes round.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: The twins are under strict instructions to keep clean for Madame Au Laits town photograph, but this proves difficult when the rest of the town need their help with some messy jobs. So when its Photo Time, they are covered in mud, compost and feathers.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Tommy and Talluah are determined to throw a magnificent party for McCoggins birthday. They get everyone involved and have fun organising the decorations, music and food, but Chikidee gets stuck in a giant cake and rolls around causing chaos.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Tommy and Tallulah are trying to make everyone laugh, but McCoggins is not responding. The twins do everything they know to make him crack and eventually he laughs so loud that he gets a case of gigglitis, but McCoggins was working on a very delicate job at the clock and now they need to cure him in time for Chime Time.

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of the Great Rains

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.desc: Nelson is in an inventive mood, and agrees to make various objects for his friends. The other animals all take it in turns to help deliver the scooter to Alan, each making their own modifications to the vehicle on the way. Alan is delighted when his very own scooter eventually arrives.

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane

programme.desc: : Its Emily Elizabeths turn to read at story time - but her book is missing the last page. Can she find a creative solution before story time begins?

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Tommy is desperate to get the hang of the game of Whackerty so that he can compete in the town tournament. Everyone has different and unusual playing styles, but when he tries to copy them the results are disastrous. Somehow he must develop his own style to win.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Tickety legend has it that McCoggins is building an amazing model of the clockhouse out of lollipop sticks. No one has seen it yet and the whole town is waiting for the grand unveiling, but when McCoggins asks Tommy and Tallulah to help him finish his model, the twins accidentally smash it.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Tommy and Tallulah have such fun with their new friend Larry the Bug that they decide to adopt him as a pet, but just as they finish making him a home, Larry flies away! After spending the day chasing him all over town, they are surprised to discover that Larry has a family of cute little baby bugs.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Tommy and Tallulah enlist Battersby as their star performer for Show Time. Unfortunately, the magic trick they devise for him doesnt go to plan and soon Madame Au Lait is stuck down Hopparoos portable hole. Tallulahs trumpet is also trapped and she needs it for Chime Time.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: When food goes missing from all over Tickety Town, Tommy and Tallulah are determined to find the culprit, but as they follow the trail of thefts, their prime suspect keeps changing as each of them has also been burgled. Meanwhile, the clockhouse has been overrun by the Spring Chicks cousins who have come to stay.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Tommy and Tallulah declare its `Camping Time and set off for the Gnarly Tree, but when the Spring Chicks tag along and pester them for their banana muffins, they move camp and forget to tell anyone where they have gone - causing a dreadful panic in Tickety town as Chime Time approaches.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Everyone is in the town square swapping something they dont want for something they do. Hopparoo ends up with Tommys drum and loves it so much that he refuses to give it back, even with Chime Time looming! The only way he will release it is if the twins can find him a bigger, louder drum to play.

programme.desc: The Enterprise crew are exposed to a deadly contaminant after investigating odd occurrences aboard the starship USS Tsiolokovsky.

programme.title: Primeval
programme.desc: When Christine Johnson and the military invade the ARC, the team are forced to flee. They take refuge in an abandoned 1930s cabin in the woods, but it is not long before danger appears in the form of vicious Pliocene-era phorusrhacids or `terror birds. Finding themselves besieged by the creatures, the team have nothing but their ingenuity and their bare hands to help them survive.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After the president of the NY Fed is gunned down trying to help a young woman in peril, the team races to find the killer and the missing woman.

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick, Hank and Wu investigate claims that a man was consumed by a tree-like Wesen.

programme.title: Warrior
programme.sub-title: Not For A Drink, A F..., Or A G..Damn Prayer
programme.desc: Mai Ling feels guilty and tries to fix things with Ah Sahm, who is determined more than ever to seek revenge. Penny has problems with her business and finds out Ah Sahm used her.

programme.title: The Force: Manchester
programme.desc: Fast-paced documentary series following the 999 work of Greater Manchester Police. Englands second largest police force, its responsible for protecting 2.7 million people.

programme.title: Brit Cops: Frontline Crime UK
programme.desc: Police officers in Wales deal with antisocial behaviour, drunken louts and drug dealers.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: More footage from Australia as we follow the men and women of the highways agencies as they patrol the countrys roads and freeways.

programme.title: Natures Dress Code: Who Wears What And Why
Waterworld Africa
programme.desc: Living on the southwestern tip of Africa is an unusual colony of African penguins. Most African penguins prefer to breed on off-shore islands in the region, but human interference on their island homes has caused many birds to look elsewhere.

programme.title: Waterworld Africa
programme.desc: The wildlife of South Africas lowveld are forced to adapt to the dry season. Everyone from the gargantuan hippos to the nimble antelope must go on a quest to seek water.

programme.title: Animals Like Us
programme.desc: A unique insight into the everyday lives of animals and how they compete, cooperate, love, and cry, just as humans do.

programme.title: Animals Like Us
programme.desc: Join a line of hermit crabs as they prepare for a very orderly house swap on a beach in Belize, and meet a chimpanzee in Senegal who has found a genet cat to keep as a pet.

programme.title: Big Cats Small World
programme.desc: Exploring the lives of big cats, shining a light on the worlds of leopards, lions, and cheetahs.

programme.title: Big Cats Small World
programme.desc: Exploring the lives of big cats, shining a light on the worlds of leopards, lions, and cheetahs.

programme.title: Ocean Parks
programme.desc: Deep in the South Caribbean Sea, explore the protected waters of Bonaire National Marine Park, home to thriving reefs, endangered sea turtles, sprawling mangroves, and a plethora of marine life.

programme.title: Baboons: Rules of the Troop
programme.desc: Follow four families of four different species - the resourceful Beach Troop, the warlike Desert Troop, the disciplined River Troop, and the peaceful Mountain Band -- to find out why these primates are among the most successful animals in Africa.

programme.title: Into the Wild Colombia
programme.desc: Growing up in the rainforests in the heart of Colombia, a young capuchin monkey has to master his climbing skills, learn how to find food and to distinguish friend from foe.

programme.title: Wild Animal Babies
programme.desc: Patrick Aryee looks at how single offspring depend on one critical life companion - their mother, who will go to extraordinary lengths to care for them.

programme.title: Wild Animal Babies
programme.desc: Exploring how some siblings quickly forge lifelong bonds, while others compete.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Natural History Museum Alive
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough brings the wonders of the Natural History Museums astonishing collection to life. During a magical, after-hours journey, he brings you closer than ever before to the extraordinary creatures that once roamed our planet.

programme.title: Micro Monsters With David Attenborough
programme.desc: Right beneath our feet is a secret world of disguise and espionage, social networking and courtship, rape and pillage, parenthood and relationships. Sir David Attenborough investigates how macroscopic residents outwit their enemies to survive.

programme.title: Nature
programme.desc: Capturing the overlooked life of the elephant and the irreplaceable role he plays in the survival of his species.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Wild City
programme.desc: With the latest film-making technology, Sir David Attenborough uncovers the unseen natural treasures of Singapore and explores how the wildlife has adapted to the human world.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Wild City
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough uncovers the unseen natural treasures of Singapore and explores how the wildlife has adapted to the human world.

programme.title: Shark With Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve explores the radical variety of sharks in the Atlantic Ocean and marks the start of a global journey in the so-called shark capital of the world, the Bahamas.

programme.title: Shark With Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Take a look behind the scenes as naturalist and shark-lover Steve Backshall gets up close and personal with these amazing creatures.

programme.title: Gladiators
programme.desc: There are clashes over precious resources when the dry season brings a band of gladiators to an African savannah watering hole. There is a lion-elephant territory brawl, an ant raid on a termite mound and a honey badgers dance with a deadly snake.

programme.title: Nature
programme.desc: Capturing the overlooked life of the elephant and the irreplaceable role he plays in the survival of his species.

programme.title: After the Wildfires
programme.desc: Documentary mapping the aftermath of the catastrophic bushfires in Australia. How does nature recover and how do the wildlife in the affected area live?

programme.title: Impossible Animals
programme.desc: Patrick Aryee examines the animals that live on the coast. From crashing waves to extreme tides, surviving here takes ingenuity and incredible adaptations.

programme.title: Planet Weird
programme.desc: Explore the partnership between clownfish and anemones and review the quid-pro-poo agreements of dung beetles and pitcher plants.

programme.title: Planet Weird
programme.desc: Watch the cannibalistic Portia spider devour the competition, uncover the bloodthirsty side of cuddly koalas and catch an epic giraffe battle.

programme.title: Cub Camp
programme.desc: Get to know Winston, a tiny abandoned cub who imprints on Judy as she nurses him 24-7. Feel the heartbreak as she severs their emotional attachment and teaches this sweet little fellow how to be a grown-up, independent bear in the non-human world.

programme.title: Cub Camp
programme.desc: Welcome sisters Xiba, Xyla, and Xola, a trio of starving orphans who turn Winstons world upside down before gentle Xola teaches him a lesson about friendship. Then monitor new cubs Yasmine and Yara, who get reacquainted after a stressful separation.

programme.title: Ol Pejeta Diaries
programme.desc: Two wild black rhinos fight to the death; a new ambassador for the black rhinos.

programme.title: Oldboy
programme.desc: Dae-Su is an obnoxious drunk bailed from the police station yet again by a friend. However, hes abducted from the street and wakes up in a cell, where he remains for the next 15 years, drugged unconscious when human contact is unavoidable, otherwise with only the television as company. And then, suddenly released, he is invited to track down his jailor with a denouement that is simply stunning.

programme.title: The Green Green Grass
programme.desc: Bored with life on the farm, Marlene throws herself into charity work. As a by-product of her efforts, Boycie senses an opportunity to become Sir Aubrey. Unfortunately, life is very rarely that simple, particularly where Boycie and Marlene are concerned.

programme.title: Im Alan Partridge
programme.desc: Alan moves on from his TV chat show to Radio Norwich in the graveyard slot. First he has one final meeting with the BBC to see if he can return to television.

programme.title: Im Alan Partridge
programme.desc: After a nervous breakdown which saw him driving all the way to Dundee in his bare feet, Alan has managed to rebuild his life. He has usurped a coveted slot on Radio Norwich, much to the annoyance of fellow DJ Dave Clifton, and has a girlfriend, the oddball Ukrainian Sonia. He has also finally moved on from the Linton Travel Tavern -into a caravan.

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: When three becomes a crowd, Gary is forced to choose between live-in lover Dorothy and live-in mate Tony. A painful decision, but not as painful as Tonys tattoo, which is intended to prove his love for Deborah.

programme.desc: Danny Bhoy is your host for the evening, introducing acts from Miles Jupp and Lee Nelson.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Veterinarian Noel Fitzpatrick is one of Englands top animal doctors and the subject of 2010 documentary programme `The Bionic Vet, which showcased some of the work done at his Surrey clinic. On `The Supervet Fitzpatrick and his staff treat some of the countrys hardest-to-cure pets with cutting-edge treatments and surgery. The programme tells the emotional stories of the pets, their owners and the passionate team that push the boundaries of veterinary medicine to save the animals from life-threatening conditions.

programme.title: Serial Killer with Piers Morgan

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Britains favourite vet, Prof Noel Fitzpatrick, travels to South Africa to help some of the most majestic but endangered wild animals, including lame tiger Laziz who has crushing arthritis.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Veterinarian Noel Fitzpatrick is one of Englands top animal doctors and the subject of 2010 documentary programme `The Bionic Vet, which showcased some of the work done at his Surrey clinic. On `The Supervet Fitzpatrick and his staff treat some of the countrys hardest-to-cure pets with cutting-edge treatments and surgery. The programme tells the emotional stories of the pets, their owners and the passionate team that push the boundaries of veterinary medicine to save the animals from life-threatening conditions.
